message:
🐛 Fix GitOps sync for kustomize directories

Detect when the manifest path contains a kustomization.yaml file
and use kubectl's -k flag instead of -f flag.

Before: kubectl diff -f /path/to/kustomize/dir (fails with "no matches for kind Kustomization")
After:  kubectl diff -k /path/to/kustomize/dir (works correctly)

This fixes drift detection and sync for repos like kuberay-operator
that use kustomize for their deployments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
